name: The Shadow Alley Den
description: Hidden behind a stack of rotting crates in a dead-end alley, a narrow stone staircase leads down into a damp, dimly lit basement. The air smells of cheap ale and stale smoke.

discovery.message: You notice a set of subtle scuff marks on a wall that seem to indicate a hidden entrance.

entrance.text: A narrow stone staircase leads down into the darkness. You can hear faint music and the clinking of glasses below.

choices.label: [Rogue] Use your knowledge of guild markers to find the safe path.

gauntlet-pressure-plate.text: The stairs are uneven. You feel a slight give under one of your boots.
gauntlet-pressure-plate.success_text: You stop mid-step, noticing a loose stone. You carefully step over it.
gauntlet-pressure-plate.failure_text: You step on a loose stone, and a hidden dart hisses out from the wall!

trap-dart-damage.text: The dart grazes your arm. (Took 3 Poison Damage)

gauntlet-tripwire.text: The passage turns sharply. It's very dark here.
gauntlet-tripwire.success_text: Your eyes catch the faint glint of a thin wire stretched across the floor. You step over it.
gauntlet-tripwire.failure_text: A thin wire catches your boot, triggering a heavy bell that echoes through the tunnel!

trap-bell-alert.text: The sound is deafening in the confined space. You've alerted the inhabitants.

gauntlet-false-door.text: At the end of the tunnel, you see a wooden door with a brass handle.

false-door-fail.text: The handle doesn't turn. As you tug on it, you realize it's a painted mural. A bucket of filth drops from the ceiling!

false-door-success.text: You realize the door is fake. A small, hidden latch nearby opens a secret panel in the wall.

guild-entrance.text: Following the scratch marks on the masonry, you navigate the traps with ease and arrive at the main hall.

den-main-hall.text: You enter a bustling underground den. Shadows dance on the walls as thieves and cutthroats trade stories and coin.
